subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Desired One! [3.5s]... ...The Bayan hath been superseded by the Kitab-i-Aqdas, except in respect of such laws as have been confirmed and mentioned in the Kitáb-i-Aqdas
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت مقصود کتاب بیان بکتاب اقدس منسوخ مگر احکامی که در کتاب اقدس موکد
subcodes.subjects: @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @naming of children; of individuals, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
